examples: Demilitarize a buffer zone between hostile countries.
After Israel signed its 1979 Camp David treaty with Egypt, both sides agreed to demilitarize parts of the Sinai.
Now Estrada is trying to demilitarize the government, but when he began the clean-up top brass floated the coup rumors and made him seem weak.
The aim of the U.N. operation is to demilitarize the area voluntarily within 30 days after troops are fully deployed and then build up administration until the region reverts to Croatia.
